title: Introduction to SENDQSAR
text: Standard Exchange Nonclinical Data (SEND), developed Clinical Data Interchange Standards Consortium (CDISC), offers structured electronic format organize exchange nonclinical study data among sponsor companies, contract research organizations (CROs), health authorities. Test results, examinations, observations subjects nonclinical study represented series SEND domains. domain defined collection logically related observations common topic.
